description_long: This is an ornate, high-backed chaise with a luxurious and classical design, featuring a carved wooden frame with intricate floral motifs and a weathered gold finish. The upholstery is a soft, tufted fabric in a muted gray tone, with button detailing on the backrest and a geometric patterned seat cushion. Both armrests are generously padded and curve outward, matching the overall opulent style. The legs are elegantly shaped, with cabriole curves and decorative carvings that enhance the antique aesthetic. A single, rectangular accent pillow with a bold geometric pattern sits at the center of the seat, adding visual interest and comfort. The back of the chaise is fully upholstered and framed by the same carved wood, providing a finished look from all angles.
description: A luxurious, high-backed chaise with ornate carved wood, tufted gray upholstery, and a geometric accent pillow. Features cabriole legs and intricate decorative details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved, padded armrest, the depth of the seat, and the ornate cabriole front leg.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tufted backrest, both armrests, the geometric accent pillow, and the detailed carvings on the frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the armrest, seat depth, and carved leg details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the fully upholstered back framed by carved wood, with no visible tufting or buttons.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and gently curved, featuring deep button tufting and a prominent, ornate carved wood crest at the top. The frame is elaborately decorated with floral motifs, and the backrest is fully upholstered in gray fabric.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, padded, and outwardly curved, matching the decorative style of the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-shaped with intricate carvings and a gold finish, giving a classic, antique appearance. The front legs are especially ornate, while the rear legs are simpler but still curved.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is primarily solid gray with button tufting on the backrest and a geometric pattern on the seat cushion and accent pillow. The fabric appears soft and matte.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, loose rectangular accent pillow placed centrally on the seat, with the main seat and backrest cushions being attached and integrated into the frame. The arrangement is symmetrical and visually balanced.
